crons.comment: PriceTrackr: check prices every hour (filters by next_check_at per tracker)
InvoiceFollow: send overdue reminders at 9am UTC daily
FeedbackLens: send weekly digest every Monday at 8am UTC
WebhookMonitor: check for silent endpoints every 15 minutes
WebhookMonitor: process exponential backoff retries every 5 minutes
WebhookMonitor: purge logs older than 30 days on the 1st of each month at 3am
